_fixtureNote: Spec-backed orchestration/UI rules from project-architecture-and-plan.md §8 (gibberish) and B7 (hint presentation). No 'max once per 3-turn window' in the architecture doc — do not treat that as spec unless added to the plan.

rules.text: Do not invoke Persona A for a post-intro technician turn classified as empty/gibberish (no synthetic customer reply for that message).
The technician gibberish row is included in the scored export; turnIndex increments in the scored transcript sequence (Removal 1 / §8).
Surface a non-blocking toast or inline banner for gibberish/empty hint copy; auto-dismiss after a few seconds (~3–5s default); do not permanently lock the composer.

proposedProductPolicy._comment: Optional throttling (e.g. max hints per N turns) is not defined in the architecture document. Add here only after PM/architecture update.
